data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for default endpoint per channel and owner.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for a default endpoint per channel and owner. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or records confirming the existence or state of these specific endpoints. The linked use case mentions the need for these records but lacks concrete evidence of their implementation or status, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: No evidence of default endpoint per channel and owner being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
